calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Off Calendar

Notice And Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of Representative Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Mar-28-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Christine T. LeVu, Esq., BLUMENTHAL NORDREHAUG BHOWMIK DE BLOUW LLP (858)551-1223 www.bamlawca.com Attorneys for Plaintiff ANA VASILIC,
No Appearance is made by Defendant.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not argued. The Court rules as follows:

Plaintiff's counsel represents to the Court that there has been no settlement as to the PAGA action. There has been no consideration that Ms. Vasilic has received for dismissal.

PLAINTIFF ANA VASILIC , ON BEHALF OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, AS A PRIVATE ATTORNEY GENERAL'S Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of Representative Action Without Prejudice is granted.

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2025 Continued To Nov-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
